description: Workflow Registry, catalog, and draft store requirements for global UI-authored workflows, source/status records, drafts, versions, and picker metadata.

userStories.title: Document registry store schema and permission decisions
userStories.description: As an implementation lead, I need schema and permission decisions before storage/API work starts so that implementation does not choose silently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a documented Workflow Registry/store schema for workflow identity, draft record, published version record, archive state, and delete/tombstone state
Add a documented permission matrix for view, duplicate, create draft, edit draft, publish, archive, and delete actions
Catalog, draft, publish, archive, and delete implementation stories reference the documented schema and permission matrix
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema, permission matrix, and implementation-story references are documented in 02-workflow-registry-catalog-and-draft-store.md.

userStories.title: Implement workflow catalog entity types
userStories.description: As a storage developer, I need explicit workflow catalog entities so that drafts, published versions, archive state, and delete state are not conflated.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement separate entities for workflow identity, draft record, published version record, archive state, and delete/tombstone state
Catalog records expose source code/ui separately from lifecycle status draft/published/archived
Delete or tombstone state does not remove snapshots required for historical run inspection
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist UI drafts in the Workflow Registry store
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need UI drafts to persist before they are valid so that I can build incrementally.
acceptanceCriteria: UI drafts are stored in the Workflow Registry/store, not Project session state
Draft records can contain partial or invalid Workflow IR plus diagnostics
Each workflow/copy has at most one active draft
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Protect drafts from invalid raw IR text
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need invalid raw text to be safe so that raw editing cannot corrupt my last valid draft object.
acceptanceCriteria: Raw IR parse failure returns a warning diagnostic
Raw IR parse failure does not overwrite the last valid persisted draft object
Valid raw IR updates the same draft IR object used by visual editing
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Raw IR parse failures now return a warning diagnostic without replacing the persisted draft definition; valid raw IR still updates the shared draft object.

userStories.title: Expose workflow catalog list and inspect APIs
userStories.description: As a UI developer, I need catalog APIs so that the Workflow Library can list and inspect code workflows, UI drafts, and UI-published versions.
acceptanceCriteria: List API returns id, title, description, tags, source, status, versions, editability, validation state, missing refs, and actions
Inspect API returns one workflow draft or published version with diagnostics
Archived workflows are hidden by default and visible with an explicit archive filter
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Chat Web now exposes authenticated workflow catalog list and inspect APIs with source/status, versions, editability, validation state, missing refs, actions, and archived filtering.

userStories.title: Implement duplicate-to-draft catalog operation
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need to duplicate workflows into drafts so that code-owned and published behavior remains stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate operation works for eligible code and UI workflows
Duplicate creates a new UI draft or opens the existing active draft for that copy
The original workflow version remains immutable and read-only
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Duplicate-to-draft now resolves the source published Workflow IR, clones it into a UI draft for code and UI-published workflows, reuses the existing active copy draft, and preserves the source definition hash for immutability checks.

userStories.title: Expose capability picker APIs
userStories.description: As a builder developer, I need picker APIs so that UI composition can select only registered capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Picker APIs list registered handlers, adapters, guards, human actions, prompt assets, workflow versions, and non-archived Agent profiles
Picker results include id, displayName, description, and a paramsSchema field whose value is a schema object or null
Archived profiles and archived workflow records are excluded from default picker results
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Authenticated picker APIs now expose profiles, handlers, adapters, guards, human actions, prompt assets, and published workflow versions with display names, descriptions, nullable paramsSchema metadata, and diagnostics for unavailable selected refs.

userStories.title: Return structured missing-reference diagnostics
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need missing refs to identify the broken id and location so that drafts can be fixed before publish or run.
acceptanceCriteria: Validation reports missing handlers, adapters, guards, profiles, prompt assets, human actions, and nested workflows
Each missing-ref diagnostic includes code, message, severity, missing id, and node/edge/path location when applicable
Missing-ref diagnostics appear in catalog inspect data and builder validation data
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: V2 draft validation now returns structured missing-reference diagnostics for registered profiles, handlers, adapters, guards, prompt assets, human actions, and nested workflow versions, and catalog inspect missingRefs now contains only missing/unavailable reference diagnostics.

userStories.title: Derive Workflow Library actions from source and status
userStories.description: As a UI developer, I need stable action derivation so that the catalog does not rely on fragile special cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Code workflow records expose view and duplicate actions but not direct edit/publish mutation actions
UI draft records expose edit, validate, publish, archive, and delete actions according to the documented permission matrix
A published, unarchived UI workflow fixture exposes duplicate, version history, archive, delete, and create Project session actions
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Version history responses now carry source/status-derived actions and editability, Workflow Library rows render those action labels/buttons, and tests assert code, UI draft, and UI-published action matrices.

userStories.title: Enforce catalog authentication and permission baseline
userStories.description: As a product reviewer, I need catalog lifecycle APIs to enforce the V2 permission baseline so that global workflows remain controlled.
acceptanceCriteria: Catalog and picker APIs require authenticated access
Authenticated users can view global UI-authored workflows and duplicate eligible workflows
Archive and delete require authentication and preserve historical snapshots
Create, edit, and publish actions enforce the documented permission matrix
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Catalog and picker APIs now have focused authentication coverage, UI workflow drafts are treated as global authenticated catalog resources, and cross-user edit/publish/duplicate permission-matrix behavior is covered by web-channel tests.
